godot_policy.palette_affine_effects: preserve source-visible timing/effect with Godot-native materials/animation when implemented

unsupported.note: The importer preserves all parsed instructions, but runtime ScriptVM semantics are implemented incrementally after source tracing.
Script sound/music/fanfare operands are preserved as symbols; real audio playback remains out of scope.

notes: Maps without scripts.inc are reported separately and do not block batch export.
Shared data/scripts/*.inc bundles remain explicit shared exports until include ownership is expanded.
